name: Entergy New Orleans LLC First Mortgage Bonds 5.50% Series due April 1 2066
summary: Entergy New Orleans LLC is a subsidiary of Entergy Corporation that provides electricity and natural gas services to the city of New Orleans, Louisiana. These bonds represent debt obligations of Entergy New Orleans, secured by a first mortgage on the company's assets. The principal will be repaid on April 1, 2066 and the company is headquartered in New Orleans, LA.
